ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbolic representation of the gene */,
  "gene_type" TEXT /* Type of the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orthologues" (
  "orthologue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each orthologue */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "orthologue_type" TEXT /* Type of orthologue (e.g., 1-to-1, 1-to-many) */,
  "orthologue_confidence" REAL /* Confidence score for the orthologue assignment */,
  "orthologue_method" TEXT /* Method used for orthologue assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orthologue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orthologues_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orthologues_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic region */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Name of the chromosome */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the region */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of the genomic region */,
  "assembly_version" TEXT /* Version of the genome assembly used for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_regions_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_alignments" (
  "alignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence alignment */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "alignment" TEXT /* Sequence alignment */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method used for sequence alignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_alignments_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_alignments_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES sequence_alignment_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_alignments_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dn_ds_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dN/dS ratio */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "dn_ds_ratio" REAL /* dN/dS ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dn_ds_ratios_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dn_ds_ratios_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_percent_ids" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target percent ID */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "target_percent_id" REAL /* Target percent ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_target_percent_ids_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_target_percent_ids_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_percent_ids" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query percent ID */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "query_percent_id" REAL /* Query percent ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_percent_ids_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_percent_ids_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_trees" (
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene tree */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "tree_data" TEXT /* Gene tree data in Newick or Nexus format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_trees_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_trees_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_alignment_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)
column_names: Confidence score for the orthologue assignment
Unique identifier for each genomic region
Version of the genome assembly used for the region
Unique identifier for each sequence alignment
ID of the method used for sequence alignment
Unique identifier for each dN/dS ratio
